/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/vk_device.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/resource_tracker.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/cmd_processor.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/metal_to_vulkan.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/framebuffer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/shader_compiler.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravityd.dir/host-daemon/src/shader_cache.c.o" -o gravityd  libgravity-protocol.a /usr/lib/libvulkan.so -lrt -lm
